content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî next plan iter (post-099)

## Closest-to-completion / prioritize
1. **(a) `dual_unit_iso_restrict_assemble`** (L1538) ‚Äî the keystone, now L1‚Ä≤-wired and PARTIAL (genuine
   ingredients elaborated; iter-085 blocker resolved). Residual = two sheaf‚Üîpresheaf reconciliations
   **RES1** (dual flank) + **RES2** (pullback flank). These are themselves real sub-lemmas.
   - **Approach (committed):** STEP-B generic-assemble ‚Äî build RES1/RES2 + sheafification-counit naturality
     as **term-mode `have`s**, then discharge the pure `‚â´`-bookkeeping by `exact` on a generic single-`[Category]`
     assemble lemma. **NO syntactic `rw`/`erw` of category lemmas** ‚Äî they all choke on the v4.31
     `instances`-transparency defeq (confirmed repeatedly this iter).
   - **Consider `effort-breaker` FIRST** to split RES1/RES2 into named `\uses`-linked sub-lemmas (each is a
     statement about how a sheaf comparator ‚Äî `restrictFunctorIsoPullback`, `pullbackUnitIso`, `dualIsoOfIso` ‚Äî
     sheafifies its presheaf core `p`/`q`). Then a prover per sub-lemma.
2. **(c) `trivialisation_restrict_compat`** (L2327) ‚Äî **DO NOT dispatch until (a)/S4a lands.** Its S4a sub-square
   (`dual_unit_iso_restrict_compat` = L2‚Ä≤) rides (a). Was sorry in v4.30 too. Re-assigning now = blind work.

## Structural decision required (auditor MAJOR)
- **3 re-ported private helpers** in `TensorObjInverse.lean` (`linearEndo_apply_comm`,
  `presheafDualUnitIso_naturality`, `homOfLocalCompat_restrictFunctor_map`) are correct re-ports of decls the
  v4.31 recovery DROPPED from `DualInverse.lean`. **Decide:** (a) `refactor` to RESTORE them upstream in
  DualInverse (de-private, remove the local copies) ‚Äî cleaner, fixes stale cross-refs in
  `PresheafDualUnitPullback.lean` L221/L267 that name them, and makes the `\lean{}` blueprint targets resolve
  to their natural home; OR (b) keep local + accept the duplication. Recommend (a). Note: while private+local,
  `#print axioms <qualified-name>` from outside fails ("unknown constant") ‚Äî same private-decl sync gap as iter-096.

## Cleanup (non-blocking; cleanup phase)
- 2 stale comments to prune (prover/refactor): `TensorObjInverse.lean` L2130 ("BLOCKER for executing now:"
  header ‚Äî assembly was executed iter-066) and L556 ("ESCALATION" tag on a resolved sub-proof).
- Dead private dup `exists_tensorObj_inverse` @ `TensorObjSubstrate.lean:716` ‚Äî deletion candidate (resolves a
  leandag conflict). Cleanup phase.
- **Coverage debt:** `archon dag-query unmatched` = 155 `lean_aux` nodes (pre-existing ~97-decl debt + this iter's
  re-ports). The one NEW genuinely-uncovered helper is `linearEndo_apply_comm` (trivial CommRing endo lemma
  `a (b 1) = b (a 1)`, no non-trivial deps) ‚Äî blueprint it or fold into the helper-restore refactor. The other
  two re-ports ARE blueprinted (`lem:presheafdualunitiso_naturality`, `lem:hom_of_local_compat_restrict`).
- **Leaf-side (non-blocking, carried):** generalise `lem:pushforward_beta_unit_eps_app_one` display `1`‚Üí`y`
  (Lean proves general; carries iter-098 `% NOTE`); 2 missing leaf helper blocks
  (`presheafPushforwardUnitIso_inv_app`, `restrictScalars_laxMonoidal_Œµ_app`).

## Reusable patterns discovered this iter (also in PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base)
- **Dropped-decl recovery:** when a ported v4.30 body fails with "Unknown identifier", grep the v4.30 parent
  `117100c4` ‚Äî the recovery may have DROPPED a helper to comment-only. Re-port it (private, local) before re-running.
- **v4.31 `eqToHom_comp_iff` choke:** syntactic `rw [eqToHom_comp_iff]` fails on `(Over.forget).op ‚ãô presheaf` ‚Üî
  `restrict` defeq under `instances` transparency. Fix: TERM mode `(eqToHom_comp_iff _ _ _).mpr h` (defeq-tolerant),
  and build the naturality hypothesis with the UNREDUCED `.left` spelling so its `.app` index matches the goal.
- **Dead LSP on monster-importing files:** `lean_goal`/`lean_diagnostic` broken-pipe. Develop in a throwaway
  scratch importing only the light upstream (DualInverse), `lake env lean` ~30‚Äì60 s loop.

## Convergence
- **CONVERGING** (progress-critic iter099 confirmed; 5/5 prover iters COMPLETE-or-justified; 085‚Äì087 wall
  structurally gone). Route narrows to (a)'s RES1/RES2 then (c) then terminal/consumer. `gaps` = 0.
